# WISHLIST — frame-capture-app

*Wants generated by this project. Swept into `personal_finances/project_wishlists.md` by `collect_wishlists.py` and evaluated there against the budget gates. Keep entries honest and rough — the finance side does the real research.*

| Item | Est. price | What it unblocks | Funding | Urgency |
|---|---:|---|---|---|

Funding values: **personal** (goes to wishlist gates / §9.3 hobby pot) · **research-budget** (routed via unit admins — RobotShop 請求書払い, Sofmap quotes, etc. — F-REI pays, never personal cards) · **unsure** (finance side decides the route).

Urgency: **now** (blocking) · **soon** (this quarter) · **someday**.
